subject: Fermi GBM trigger 652585475  / 210906073 is not a GRB
body:
P. Veres (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 652585475  / 210906073
at 01:44:30.10 UT on 6 September 2021, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to SGR J1935+2154."
